subject: Re:
body:
I think all of your comments are valid re garding the
letter please forward to alans office..THANKS 
especially the beginning.

--- gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

> I have now done the full rounds and seen almost
> everyone that has something to say or wants to say
> something  - Pam Gross et al - I hit fashion week
> just to do that - I won't be unhappy not to go to
> another show unless it's for a friend in future -
> all quite ok actually - nothing you don't know - I
> feel better now - I thought I would have a rougher
> re entry and that my being back might spark
> something - we will see about that - I've got a
> handle on the chatter if you want it but I don't
> think it adds anything
> Kisses
> G  
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
I think all of your comments are valid re garding the
letter please forward to alans office..THANKS
especially the beginning.

--- gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

I have now done the full rounds and seen almost
everyone that has something to say or wants to say
something - Pam Gross et al - I hit fashion week
just to do that - I won't be unhappy not to go to
another show unless it's for a friend in future -
all quite ok actually - nothing you don't know - I
feel better now - I thought I would have a rougher
re entry and that my being back might spark
something - we will see about that - I've got a
handle on the chatter if you want it but I don't
think it adds anything
Kisses
G
